ai_summary: Elon Musk makes a claim about Grok, xAI's AI assistant, positioning it as 'maximally truthful'—a core product differentiation strategy. This reflects xAI's business positioning around developing AI systems with high factual accuracy, which is a key competitive angle in the crowded AI market and directly relevant to the company's go-to-market strategy and product development philosophy.

text: Tesla FSD 14.3.4 rolling out now https://t.co/Lbtx2Yeo6i
ai_summary: Elon Musk announced the rollout of Tesla FSD (Full Self-Driving) version 14.3.4, indicating continued iterative development and deployment of Tesla's autonomous driving software. This represents Tesla's progress in advancing its autonomous vehicle technology, a core product differentiator and long-term business objective for the company.
